benefits.description: Hair is now very thick after previous severe hair loss. Red light hat regrew desired amount of hair.

side_effects.description: Finasteride and minoxidil had negative effects on mood and libido
Finasteride and minoxidil had negative effects on mood and libido
Finasteride and minoxidil had negative effects on facial skin

protocol_notes: Has used Finasteride, Minoxidil, RU58841, Taeian Clark's hair protocol, and microneedling. Currently only uses red light hat therapy (Amazon $100 model) as ongoing maintenance. Runs testosterone and primobolan cycle once yearly. Experienced severe hair loss at one point but recovered with comprehensive protocol. Considers red light therapy best option for side effect profile and maintenance.
